description: history attribute on a NON-composite state-child (§51.0.N). <Idle history> is a simple state-child with no nested <engine> in its body, so there is no inner engine to track. history is legal ONLY on a composite state-child, so E-HISTORY-NO-INNER-ENGINE fires (the §34 error partition).
rationale: §51.0.N history is legal ONLY on a state-child whose body contains a nested <engine> (a composite state-child); otherwise E-HISTORY-NO-INNER-ENGINE.
